title: Pungent Chinese Fromage Blanc Noodles
description: A fatty and snappy Fujian dish featuring fromage-blanc and katsuramuki-cut ingredients, perfect for a hangover cure, this low-calorie-friendly Chinese noodle dish is a must try.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
Drain the noodles and set them aside.
Slice the katsuramuki-cut pork into thin strips.
Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the sliced pork and stir-fry until browned.
Add the soy sauce and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet or wok and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Stir in the crumbly fromage-blanc and cook until heated through.
Transfer the noodles to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions.
